title: Custom Multi-Pet Felt Portrait – Personalized Family Pet Gift in Premium Oval Frame

metaTitle: Custom Multi-Pet Felt Portrait – Personalized Family Pet Gift
metaDescription: Custom multi-pet felt portrait in premium oval frame. 100% wool roving, glass eyes, text option. Order today for a heartfelt family pet gift!
shortDescription: Custom multi-pet felt portrait in a premium oval frame, handcrafted with 100% wool roving and glass eyes. Perfect family pet gift.
fullDescription:
Celebrate every member of your furry family with our Custom Multi-Pet Felt Portrait, a heartfelt masterpiece that captures the unique personality of each pet. Handcrafted from 100% wool roving and featuring lifelike glass eyes, this portrait is set in a premium 10-12 inch oval wooden frame, making it a timeless addition to any home.

**Why You'll Love It:**
- **Emotional Hook:** Whether it's dogs, cats, or a mix of both, this portrait brings your pets to life in a soft, textured art form. It's the perfect way to honor your beloved companions and keep them close.
- **Customization Options:** Personalize with your pets' names in the frame for an extra-special touch. Our skilled artisans work from your photos to ensure each detail—from fur color to expression—is captured with care.
- **Craftsmanship & Quality:** Made with premium materials, including 100% wool roving and glass eyes, this felt portrait is built to last. The oval frame adds an elegant, gallery-worthy finish.
- **Gift for Every Occasion:** Ideal for pet lovers, this makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, holidays, or as a memorial piece. It's a unique custom animal portrait that will be treasured forever.

**Customization Process:**
1. Upload clear photos of your pets (face and body).
2. Provide names for text personalization (optional).
3. Our team handcrafts your portrait within 18-24 days.
4. Receive your ready-to-display masterpiece.

**Specifications:**
- Material: 100% wool roving, glass eyes, premium wooden frame
- Size: 10-12 inch oval frame
- Production Time: 18-24 days
- Price: $89

Bring your multi-pet family to life with this one-of-a-kind felt portrait—order now and create a lasting memory!
